heading: Construction of intelligence community facilities; Presidential authorization
label: 3303 Construction of intelligence community facilities; Presidential authorization
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 403–2a of this title

children.label: a
children.text: No project for the construction of any facility, or improvement to any facility, having an estimated Federal cost in excess of $300,000, may be undertaken in any fiscal year unless specifically identified as a separate item in the President’s annual fiscal year budget request or otherwise specifically authorized and appropriated if such facility or improvement would be used primarily by personnel of the intelligence community.

children.label: b
children.text: As used in this section, the term “intelligence community” has the same meaning given that term in .section 3003(4) of this title
